heading: Report to Congress
label: 6003 Report to Congress
text: Not later than , the Administrator of the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration shall report to Congress on the effectiveness of the grant program established by . The report shall include a list of grant recipients, a summary of the types of programs implemented by the grantees, and any recommendation by the Administrator regarding how the program should be changed in the future.May 1, 1997section 6001 of this title
